overview: A playable 3D First-Person Shooter game with cyberpunk neon aesthetics. Features WASD movement, hitscan shooting with ammo management, AI enemies that charge the player, health/score tracking, and a full-viewport game canvas.
features: WASD + mouse first-person movement and camera
Hitscan shooting with ammo counter and reload (R key)
AI enemies that spawn and charge toward player
Health bar and score counter UI
Hit feedback — enemy flash and screen red tint on damage
